warning.info1: This is an in-development build of Encore.
warning.info2: This version is a release of the old codebase to have *something* out there while we work on a rewrite.
warning.debug1: Press F3 to access the debug menu.
warning.debug2: This unlocks half of the available utilities and toys Encore currently has to offer.

bulletList.dsMode:
A very basic, shitty DualShock mode is available
in the Overshell below.
bulletList.instType: Some devices (like Santroller instruments) might not be detected as the correct instrument. Use the Instrument Type option in the Overshell to change it.
bulletList.songPaths: Song paths can be set in Settings > Gameplay. Encore supports CH/PS (.ini) song folders with a notes.mid file.
